# ONLYMORE Group — Full Reference
> Holding fintech mutualist. Inclusion financiere par le sport.
> Fondee 2025, Rodilhan (30230), Occitanie, France.
> Contact: onlymore2024@gmail.com
> Fondateur: Florent Gibert

## About ONLYMORE Group
ONLYMORE Group is a mutualist fintech holding company headquartered in Rodilhan,
Occitanie, France. Founded in 2025, the group operates at the intersection of
financial technology, sport, and social impact. The group's mission is to enable
financial inclusion through sport, with the vision: "Que chacun puisse vivre et
prosperer la ou il a grandi" (So that everyone can live and prosper where they grew up).

The group fights three interconnected challenges:
1. Poverty — reducing economic exclusion in local communities
2. Talent drain — stopping the exodus of talent from small cities
3. Forced emigration — fighting the necessity to leave home for opportunity

## Subsidiaries (5 Filiales)

### CROWNIUM (LIVE)
- URL: https://crownium.club
- Type: Fan co-ownership fintech for sports clubs
- Model: Mutualist SAS — fans become co-owners of their local clubs
- Status: Live and operational
- Description: CROWNIUM enables fans to collectively own shares in their local
  sports clubs through a mutualist corporate structure (SAS). This democratizes
  club ownership, keeps revenue local, and creates a sustainable funding model
  for community sports.

### COLHYBRI (LIVE)
- URL: https://colhybri.com
- Type: Local commerce SaaS solidarity platform
- Status: Live and operational
- Description: COLHYBRI is a SaaS platform that empowers local merchants through
  digital tools and a solidarity network. It helps small businesses compete by
  providing shared infrastructure, digital presence, and community-driven support.

### DOJUKU SHINGI (COMING SOON)
- Type: Martial arts AI application
- Status: In development
- Description: An AI-powered application for martial arts practitioners. DOJUKU
  SHINGI combines traditional martial arts wisdom with modern AI technology to
  provide personalized training, technique analysis, and community connection.

### ONLYMORE FINANCE (COMING SOON)
- Type: Lombard credit structure
- Status: In development
- Description: ONLYMORE FINANCE provides Lombard credit structures — loans backed
  by financial assets. This enables individuals and businesses to access liquidity
  without selling their investments, promoting financial inclusion and wealth
  preservation.

### PLUMAYA Editions (COMING SOON)
- Type: Publishing and intellectual property
- Status: In development
- Description: PLUMAYA Editions handles publishing and intellectual property for
  the group, including the proprietary SHINGAN notation system. PLUMAYA creates
  and distributes educational and cultural content aligned with the group's
  social mission.

## Key URLs

## Languages Supported
The website is available in 25 languages:
French (default), English, Spanish, Portuguese, German, Italian, Dutch, Arabic,
Chinese, Japanese, Korean, Turkish, Polish, Russian, Hindi, Indonesian,
Vietnamese, Thai, Swedish, Danish, Norwegian, Finnish, Greek, Romanian, Czech.

## Team
- Florent Gibert — Founder & CEO
- Joao Almeida — CFO
- Stephane Picard — Fundraising Partner

## Investor Information
ONLYMORE Group is open to investors who share the vision of financial inclusion
through sport. The group operates on a mutualist model, prioritizing social
impact alongside financial returns.
